title: Carved No Longer
description: A simple resource pack for 1.8 that changes carved pumpkins to normal pumpkins.
body:
📝| Introduction
Carved No Longer is a 1.8 resource pack that makes pumpkins not carved.

💻| Installation
There a a few ways to install this texture pack here are two.
1. Download from modrinth app.
2. Download from modrinth website as zip.
